title: ItemBury - Lock up your treasures.
description: Adds the ability to bury items in sand or gravel, turning them into mysterious suspicious bloc
body:
Adds the ability to bury items in sand or gravel, turning them into mysterious suspicious blocks! This plugin is perfect for servers

What can the plugin do? ✨
Hold the shovel in your main hand, the item in your second hand, Press Shift and Right-click on the sand or gravel block. After 5 seconds the object will be safely hidden in the suspicious block.
Also Particles will appear during the burying process

 Works with any object you can hold in your hand, and supports all types of shovels (from wooden to non-serite).
